scripts.dev:py: cd apps/api-py && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload
scripts.build:core-go: mkdir -p dist && cd apps/core-go && go build -o ../../dist/core-go .
scripts.test: bun test:web && bun test:api && bun test:core-go
scripts.lint: bun lint:web && bun lint:api && bun lint:core-go
scripts.lint:web: cd apps/web && bun lint && bun format
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api-py && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format .
scripts.lint:core-go: cd apps/core-go && [ -z "$(find . -name '*.go' -not -path './vendor/*' -print0 | xargs -0 gofmt -l)" ] && go vet ./...
scripts.qa: bun type-check && bun lint && bun run test
